## Final Rule

AIM v0.2 Sprint 2 connects manual intake to a bounded local input surface.

The intake UI prepares local draft payloads only when validation allows.

The intake UI does not govern, approve, execute, advise, mutate verified AIM output, or mutate journal truth.
